name: Oyster HR API
description: REST API for global employment operations including hiring, payroll, benefits, time off, expenses, invoicing, offboarding, and webhooks. Supports both customer-direct and reseller/partner integration patterns with OAuth2 client credentials authentication.

potentialAction.name: Manage Departments
potentialAction.description: Retrieve company details and manage departments

potentialAction.name: Manage Benefits
potentialAction.description: Manage benefit offerings, enrollments, and provisioning

potentialAction.name: Manage Contracts and Employment
potentialAction.description: Create, update, and manage EOR employment records, contracts, and agreements

potentialAction.name: Manage Expenses
potentialAction.description: Create, approve, and decline expense records

potentialAction.name: Manage Invoices
potentialAction.description: Handle invoices, credit notes, payment and charge group management

potentialAction.name: Manage Payroll
potentialAction.description: Manage payroll operations and payroll changes

potentialAction.name: Manage Time Off
potentialAction.description: Create and track time off requests and entitlements

potentialAction.name: Manage Timesheets
potentialAction.description: Create and track timesheets for contractor engagements

potentialAction.name: Hire Employees
potentialAction.description: Create and submit EOR employment, manage onboarding forms and agreements

potentialAction.name: Offboard Employees
potentialAction.description: Manage terminations, resignations, and offboarding agreements

potentialAction.name: Manage Webhooks
potentialAction.description: Configure and receive webhooks for events across benefits, contracts, engagements, expenses, hiring, invoicing, offboarding, payments, payroll, and time tracking
